name: OPQ32r
description: Measures 32 personality characteristics across three domains: relationships with people, thinking styles, and feelings and emotions. Predicts leadership potential, team fit, and cultural alignment.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses 18 dimensions of workplace motivation including energy and dynamism, commercial focus, and personal growth. Predicts engagement, retention risk, and job satisfaction.

name: Verify G+ General Ability
description: Adaptive test measuring overall cognitive ability (g-factor) combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. Strong predictor of learning potential and job performance across roles.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to analyse and interpret numerical data from tables, graphs, and charts. Critical for roles requiring data analysis, finance, engineering, or numerical judgement.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to understand, evaluate, and draw conclusions from written information. Essential for roles requiring communication, policy analysis, consulting, legal, or HR work.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Tests abstract reasoning by identifying rules and patterns in shape sequences. Predicts problem-solving ability and adaptability; especially relevant for technical, IT, and engineering roles.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from premises and rules. Suited for compliance, legal, operations, and roles where rule-based structured analysis is critical.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Evaluates understanding of mechanical principles such as levers, pulleys, gears, and fluid dynamics. Used for engineering, trades, manufacturing, and technical maintenance positions.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Measures speed and accuracy in basic arithmetic. Relevant for clerical, financial, and operational roles requiring numerical accuracy under time pressure.

name: Verify Checking
description: Assesses attention to detail by spotting errors or mismatches in data sets. Critical for data-entry, administrative, quality control, and financial accuracy roles.

name: Automata Fix
description: Presents broken code for candidates to debug and fix across multiple languages including Java, Python, JavaScript, C++, and SQL. Tests practical debugging skills for developers at all levels.

name: Automata Pro
description: Full coding simulation requiring candidates to build or extend real features in a realistic IDE. Measures end-to-end software engineering including design, implementation, and testing.

name: Java (New)
description: Adaptive coding assessment for Java developers covering object-oriented design, collections, concurrency, exception handling, and Java APIs. Suitable for junior to senior Java roles.

name: Python (New)
description: Adaptive coding assessment for Python developers covering data structures, algorithms, OOP, file handling, and the Python standard library. Relevant for backend, data engineering, and ML engineers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Assesses SQL proficiency including joins, subqueries, aggregations, window functions, and query optimisation. Used for data analysts, database administrators, and backend developers.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Adaptive coding test for JavaScript developers covering DOM, async programming, closures, prototypal inheritance, and ES6+ features. Suitable for frontend and Node.js roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Evaluates C++ skills including memory management, pointers, templates, STL, and performance optimisation. Used for systems programming, embedded, and high-performance computing roles.

name: .NET (New)
description: Coding assessment for C# and .NET developers covering LINQ, async/await, dependency injection, ASP.NET, and .NET runtime concepts. Relevant for enterprise backend roles.

name: Contact Center Simulation
description: Realistic simulation of customer service and contact centre scenarios including live-chat, email, and call handling. Measures empathy, multitasking, accuracy, and customer-first communication.

name: Customer Service Assessment
description: Measures customer-facing competencies: empathy, communication clarity, problem resolution, and patience. Suitable for retail, hospitality, support, and service desk positions.

name: Sales Achievement Predictor
description: Combines personality and motivation data to predict sales performance. Covers competitiveness, persuasion, resilience, and drive. Validated for field sales, inside sales, and account management.

name: Situational Judgement
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios for candidates to select the most and least effective responses. Assesses practical judgement, values alignment, and decision-making across career levels.

name: Graduate Item Bank
description: High-difficulty cognitive battery (numerical, verbal, inductive) calibrated for graduate and early-career recruitment. Differentiates high-potential graduates from large applicant pools.

name: Managerial/Professional Item Bank
description: Cognitive battery at managerial-level difficulty: numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning benchmarked against senior professional and management populations worldwide.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument
description: Assesses counterproductive work behaviours, safety compliance attitudes, and reliability. Used for safety-critical, blue-collar, and operational roles where dependability is paramount.

name: Work Strengths
description: Measures practical work readiness for entry-level positions: reliability, flexibility, teamwork, and customer focus. Designed for high-volume frontline and hourly worker hiring.

name: Technology Professional
description: Broad battery for IT professionals covering logical reasoning, technology concepts, and role-specific knowledge modules. For IT support, systems administration, and tech consulting.

name: Administrative Professional
description: Measures clerical speed, accuracy, and administrative competencies including data entry, document checking, and business writing. For PA, executive assistant, and office administration roles.

name: Scenarios
description: Immersive scenario-based assessment combining personality measurement with situational judgement. Branching decisions map to OPQ personality scales for deeper behavioural insight.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: AI-scored structured interview platform providing competency-aligned questions, real-time scoring guidance, and post-interview analytics for hiring managers.

name: Smart Interview On Demand
description: Asynchronous video interview platform where candidates record responses to structured questions. AI analyses verbal content and communication clarity to rank candidates at scale.

name: Universal Competency Framework 360
description: 360-degree multi-rater assessment based on SHL's Universal Competency Framework covering 20 competency clusters. For leadership development, succession planning, and performance management.
